title: alternanthera laxa
intro: Alternanthera laxa, also known as Lax Calamansi or Calamansi, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of citric acid and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin infections. The health benefits of Alternanthera laxa include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
